Employee Master — ESI / PF / PT Configuration
# Name Category Monthly Rate ₹ ESI PF PT Routing Mode Lock DA
🔒 Locked = salary structure fixed, only Days Worked editable in calculator  ·  Regular employees eligible for ESI / PF / PT within statutory caps  ·  Daily wage workers: cash only, no deductions  ·  DA = Differently Abled — no DW pool routing through their salary

📥 Import Pending Orders from Excel
1 · SELECT FILE
2 · PREVIEW & VALIDATE
3 · IMPORT COMPLETE
📂
Click to select Excel file (.xlsx)
or drag and drop here
Required Excel columns (row 1 = headers):
ITEM_NO  |  QTY_ORDERED  |  PROMISE_DT  |  STATUS (optional)
Click ⬇ Template in toolbar to download a ready-made template.
# Item Code Description Qty Due Date Status ✓
✅
📥 Sync from Phone
FIREBASE URL ✓
⚠ Firebase error 401 — Security rules are blocking access
Fix in 3 steps:
1. Go to console.firebase.google.com
2. Your Project → Realtime Database → Rules tab
3. Replace rules with:
{
  "rules": {
    ".read": true,
    ".write": true
  }
}
4. Click Publish
This allows ProMRP Phone and Desktop to sync without authentication.

📥 Import PO Receipt from Excel
1 · SELECT FILE
2 · PREVIEW & MATCH
3 · IMPORT COMPLETE
📂
Click to select Excel file (.xlsx)
or drag and drop here
Required Excel columns (row 1 = headers):
Part Number  |  Qty
Each row will be matched to open PO lines by item code and receipt quantity posted to ledger.
# Part Number Description Qty Matched PO Status

📥 Import BOM Components from Excel
1 · SELECT FILE
2 · PREVIEW & VALIDATE
3 · IMPORT COMPLETE
📂
Click to select Excel file (.xlsx)
or drag and drop here
Required Excel columns (row 1 = headers):

Parent_Item_Code  |  Component_Item_Code  |  Qty_Per  |  Scrap_Pct (optional, default 2)  |  Line No (optional)

✔ Compact format supported — Parent_Item_Code may appear only on the first row. Blank cells will automatically inherit the value above.
✔ Items do NOT need to exist in the Item Master — new items and BOM Headers will be auto-created on import.

Click ⬇ Template in the toolbar to download a ready-made template.
ROW PARENT ITEM COMPONENT ITEM QTY PER SCRAP % STATUS
✅
📤 Upload Stock from Excel — Verified Update
1 · SELECT FILE
2 · VERIFY & PREVIEW
3 · DONE
📂
Click to select Excel file (.xlsx / .xls)
or drag and drop here
Required Excel columns (any header names work):

Part Number / Item Code   +   Quantity / Stock / QtyOH

Stock will be compared against current values. You will see a preview before any changes are applied. Items not found in the Item Master will be skipped.
# Part Number Description Current Qty New Qty Difference Status
✅
📥 Import Item Master from Excel
1 · SELECT FILE
2 · PREVIEW & VALIDATE
3 · IMPORT COMPLETE
📂
Click to select Excel file (.xlsx)
or drag and drop here
Required Excel columns (row 1 = headers):

Item_Code  |  Description  |  Make_Buy (M or P)  |  Qty_on_Hand (optional)  |  Status (optional, default Active)

Click ⬇ Template in the toolbar to get a ready-made template.
ROW ITEM CODE DESCRIPTION M/P QTY ON HAND STATUS VALIDATION
